title: Unoriginal
description: A simple datapack that removes all base origins added by the Origins mod
body:
- Unoriginal -

A simple datapack that removes all* base origins added by the Origins mod Great for modpack making!

Removes :

  • arachnid
  • avian
  • blazeborn
  • elytrian
  • enderian
  • feline
  • merling
  • phantom
  • shulk
> *(It doesn't remove the Human origin)
The data pack works on 1.16 - 1.20.x but some versions will show an incompatible warning!
